pages.full_text:
Sunday September 29th 2013
    We packed up camp. Joseph played with Hannah in the next-door tent.
[postcard: CHINNOR and WHITELEAF CROSS]
We saw a new housing estate & a steam train at Chinnor station.
photo_captions: We saw a new housing estate & a steam train at Chinnor station.
pages.notes: Postcard glued in titled 'CHINNOR and WHITELEAF CROSS' with three photographs. Vertical caption alongside the photos reads: 'We saw a new housing estate & a steam train at Chinnor station.' No handwritten page number visible in top-left corner.

Page contains a hand-traced outline drawing of two overlapping hands (one larger adult hand, one smaller child's hand), labelled 'Joseph + Baba' in the centre. Small decorative wheat/leaf motif (printed sticker or stamp) at the bottom centre. Handwritten page number '45' visible in top-right corner (partially cropped but legible). The gutter area of this image shows overflow text from the left page.
